text: Leap frog has a version of Nex playground if you’re buying it for kids.
text_zh: 如果给孩子买，Leap frog 有 Nex playground 的一个版本。

text: I’ve been deinfluenced. Thank you kind sir
text_zh: 我被“去影响”了。谢谢好心人

text: Mfs ain’t ever heard of a Wii ?
text_zh: 这帮人没听过 Wii 吗？

text: Idc when I’m buying multiple $50-$80 plus games $100 a year don’t sound to bad
text_zh: 我不管我买好几个50-80美元以上的游戏，一年100美元听起来不算太糟

text: I hate all this damn subscription s***😭!!!
text_zh: 我讨厌所有这些该死的订阅服务！！！😭

text: Remember when you could just own things and not have to buy a subscription
text_zh: 还记得以前我们可以直接买东西，不用买订阅服务的时候吗

text: yall won’t pay a subscription but what do you do when you have a play station or Xbox? You buy games don’t you. Am I the only one who thinks the subscription for nex playground is reasonable? 😩
text_zh: 你们都不愿意付订阅费，但买了 PlayStation 或 Xbox 时你们会怎么做？你们会买游戏，对吧？难道只有我觉得 Nex Playground 的订阅费很合理吗？😩

text: I love our Nex playground but yes that subscription caught me off guard! However, I compared to paying for games individually on other systems and Nex made more sense for my little kids.
text_zh: 我喜欢我们的Nex playground，但那个订阅制确实让我意外！不过，我跟给其他游戏机单独买游戏比起来，Nex对我的小孩子来说更划算。

text: Nex playground is worth it yall I promise!!! I got mine from Amazon on sale for like $120. My kids and I love it
text_zh: Nex Playground 绝对值，我向你们保证！！！我在亚马逊打折时花了120美元左右买的。我和我的孩子们都爱死它了

text: A switch 2 is $500 w/ $80 games. A PS5 is $550 and has $70 games. The Nex Playground is a great alternative
text_zh: Switch 2要500美元，游戏80美元。PS5要550美元，游戏70美元。Nex Playground是个不错的替代品

text: You doing the lords work cause I had it in my cart!! Hell no!!!
text_zh: 你真是做好事，我差点就把这玩意儿放进购物车了！！绝对不行！！！

text: thank you for deinfluencing me on something I’d never buy😭😭 start a review series I’d trust you 😂
text_zh: 谢谢你让我对一个我永远不会买的东西拔草了😭😭 开始一个我信任的评测系列吧 😂

text: Yes I never understood why you buy something then go pay for a subscription to use the thing you already got. Like the pelton bike to get the good workouts you gotta get the subscription after paying 1,000 dollars.
text_zh: 是啊，我一直不明白，为什么你买了一个东西，然后还得付费订阅才能用你已经买的东西。就像 Peloton 自行车，付了 1000 块之后，还得花钱订阅才能获得好的锻炼。

text: and thats why I took it tf back to walmart😂😭 cause it's literally a waste of time
text_zh: 这就是为什么我把它退回 Walmart 了😂😭 因为这简直是浪费时间

text: Thank you for de-influencing me on both the nex playground and the litter box. I was planning on Christmas for BOTH of those items😭😭😂
text_zh: 谢谢你让我对 Nex 游乐场和猫砂盆都拔草了。我本来圣诞节都给这两个东西准备好了😭😭😂

text: most of the games are just mobile apps 😭
text_zh: 大多数游戏都是手机App而已😭

text: Thank you for telling me because I was definitely getting it for my nephews for Christmas 🤷🏾‍♀
text_zh: 谢谢你告诉我，因为我本来真的要圣诞节给我的侄子们买这个的 🤷🏾‍♀

text: Oh never mind then my kids can just cross that shit off there the goddamn Christmas list right the fuck now
text_zh: 哦，算了，我孩子可以直接把这个从圣诞愿望清单上划掉去他妈的了。

text: Why even spend 200 then??? Companies kill me with their subscriptions and prices that make no damn sense. 100?! Not 5-10- maybe even 15-20 dollar month subscription?? 100?!?!?
text_zh: 那为什么要花 200 块？？？这些公司真是让我受不了，他们的订阅费和价格真是没道理。100？！不是 5-10- 甚至 15-20 块一个月的订阅费？？100？？？

text: For those suggesting the LeapFrog games, DON'T get Leap Move. The graphics are dated and it barely picks up when your child is in range. I got it for free to review and I was so glad I didn't pay for it.
text_zh: 对于那些推荐 LeapFrog 游戏的人，千万不要买 Leap Move。画面很过时，而且它根本不怎么能检测到你的孩子是否在范围内。我拿到它是免费测评的，非常庆幸我没花钱买。

text: Thanks babe, bc i was gonna get one for my kids & i would have been pisseddddd🤣
text_zh: 谢谢宝贝，因为我本来要给我孩子买一个，那我得气死了 🤣

text: Sooooo……… PlayStation is $400-500 and the yearly subscription is $89-160 a year… vs $300….. pick and choose your battles, but it’s not that bad honestly.
text_zh: 所以说…… PlayStation 要 400-500 美元，一年订阅费还要 89-160 美元…… vs 300 美元…… 自己看着办吧，但说实话，这也没那么差。

text: Thank you for saying that because I was going to do that instead of a Nintendo switch for my daughter for Christmas
text_zh: 谢谢你这么说，因为我本来打算圣诞节给我女儿买这个而不是 Nintendo Switch 的

text: I rather pay $100 a year for subscription for TONS of games than $80+ for ONE game on the ps5🙄
text_zh: 我宁愿每年花 100 美元订阅一大堆游戏，也不愿花 80 美元以上买 PS5 的一个游戏 🙄

text: Me and my kids love it, the games are great and fun af. Definitely worth the money and the $100 subscription isn’t the only option. New games are added to it constantly, lots of learning games as well as arcade games, plussss plenty of fitness apps as well. It’s not the same as a wii, vr or ps add on( your kids don’t have to have a controller or wand in there hand) , it’s games you don’t have to supervise aka you don’t have to worry about anything violent or not age appropriate. If you want something kid focused, low maintenance & fun for the whole family it’s a great investment.
text_zh: 我和我的孩子们都很喜欢，游戏很棒，太好玩了。绝对物有所值，而且100美元的订阅费不是唯一的选择。新游戏不断加入，有很多学习类游戏和街机游戏，此外还有很多健身应用。这和 Wii、VR 或 PS 的附加设备不一样（你的孩子们不需要手里拿着控制器或魔杖），这是你不需要监督的游戏，也就是说你不用担心任何暴力或不适合年龄的内容。如果你想要一个以孩子为中心、低维护且全家都喜欢的选择，这是一项很棒的投资。

text: I mean? We pay to play on our consoles every month costing well over $100 a year lol no different and they get free games every month
text_zh: 我是说啊？我们每个月都要花一百多刀玩游戏机，这也没啥区别，他们还每个月送免费游戏呢

text: I mean I pay $18 or $19 a month for my son's Xbox subscription and that gives him access to a ton of new games and stuff. I rarely ever have to buy a new game for him. games are about $80 a pop, so I consider it worth it. if this is the same way, it's prob worth it
text_zh: 我是说，我每个月花 18 块或 19 块钱订阅我儿子的 Xbox，这样他就能玩好多新游戏和东西了。我基本不用给他买新游戏。游戏一张都要 80 块，我觉得挺值的。如果这个也一样，那应该也值。

text: Man if yall don’t go get a mf Wii with the Wii sports or dance dance revolution hell idk
text_zh: 我的天，你们这些人不去买个 Wii 玩 Wii Sports 或者劲舞革命（Dance Dance Revolution）之类的，我也不知道该说什么了

text: I pay $170 a year for my PlayStation membership so that’s not bad
text_zh: 我每年为我的PlayStation会员付170美元，所以这个不算贵

text: They got the Xbox kinect everyone forget about that
text_zh: 他们有 Xbox Kinect，大家都忘了这个了

text: Anyways I’m getting my son one😂 $89 a year for endless games…. Absolutely! One game cost $30-80. Not to mention the Kinect and Wii were the SAME PRICE WHEN RELEASED. Actually the nex is cheaper when you factor in games and remotes
text_zh: 总之我要给我儿子买一个😂 每年 89 美元玩不完的游戏……太值了！一个游戏就要 30-80 美元。更不用说 Kinect 和 Wii 发布时的价格是一样的。实际上，考虑到游戏和遥控器，nex 要便宜得多

text: You pay 100 a year for the switch too and PlayStation 😭🤣
text_zh: 你 Switch 和 PlayStation 一年也要付100美元😭🤣

text: 300 dollars cheaper then ps5 and Xbox and only $8 a month? That’s not bad
text_zh: 比ps5和Xbox便宜300美元，一个月才8美元？这价格不赖

text: PlayStation 600$ each game 70$ nex 250$ 100$ a year for all the games.
text_zh: PlayStation 600 美元，每个游戏 70 美元，Nex 250 美元，一年 100 美元所有游戏。

text: True but a PS5 is $499+ & the games like $70 each & subscription like $160. what do you suggest for a 5 yo he's not getting a ps5 or xbox
text_zh: 没错，但 PS5 要 499 美元以上，游戏每个 70 美元，订阅费 160 美元。你给一个 5 岁的孩子有什么推荐？他不可能玩 PS5 或 Xbox

text: True, but Xbox games are $20-$60, seitch games are 20-30. I could buy my kid maybe 5 games on her switch for the same price. you get over 40 games and they are constantly adding. There’s still 5 free games if you don’t play.
text_zh: 没错，但 Xbox 游戏要 20-60 美元，Switch 游戏是 20-30 美元。同样的价格我大概能给我女儿买 5 款 Switch 游戏。你这里有 40 多款游戏，而且还在不断添加。如果你不玩，还有 5 款免费游戏。

text: it's for the babies. my youngest has adhd and it's 100 degrees 10 months out of the year here in south texas and this is a way to get her energy out.
text_zh: 这是给宝宝玩的。我最小的孩子有多动症，这里一年有 10 个月气温都 100 度（华氏度），这是让她发泄精力的一种方式。

text: Isn’t PlayStation plus $150 a year..? 😂
text_zh: PlayStation Plus 不是一年 150 美元吗？😂

text: I’m literally buying the leap frog version
text_zh: 我简直要买 Leap Frog 的那个版本了

text: I thought Nex playground was like Limi Kids or Brain Rich kids playgrounds. 😩 I was so far off
text_zh: 我以为“下一个游乐场”是像 Limi Kids 或 Brain Rich kids playground 那种。😩 我完全搞错了

text: We play the free ones 🤣🤣 lmaooo
text_zh: 我们玩免费的那些 🤣🤣 哈哈哈

text: I’m returning mine just for that reason 😡
text_zh: 我就因为那个原因要退货了 😡

text: Yeah I considered it and I was like yeaaahhh I'm not paying that much for an subscription hell that's one reason I won't even get the new Nintendo switch I'll get the steam deck
text_zh: 是啊，我考虑过，然后我就想算了，我才不花那么多钱买个订阅呢，说实话，这也是我为啥不买新的任天堂Switch，我宁愿买Steam Deck

text: I literally just told my man I wanted to get the next playground for our twins too 😩 ty!!!
text_zh: 我刚才跟男朋友说也想给我们的龙凤胎买个next playground 😩 谢谢你！！！

text: told my dad last year I wanted one for my kids but after finding out the cost, he found some off brand game console for like $50 that has 100+ old school games plus a VR game section plus it came with a dance mat so they can play some dance dance revolution type stuff. the kids LOVE it
text_zh: 去年我告诉爸爸我想给我的孩子们买一个，但得知价格后，他花了50美元买了一个杂牌游戏机，里面有100多个老式游戏，还有一个VR游戏区，还送了一个跳舞垫，这样他们就可以玩类似《舞力全开》之类的游戏了。孩子们超爱它

text: I mean if you’re an avid gamer then it makes sense because a new game on a play station is 60-80 dollars. But it’s not feasible if you don’t play that much
text_zh: 我是说，如果你是个游戏狂，那倒是说得通，因为 PlayStation 的新游戏要 60-80 块。但如果你玩得不多，那就不划算了。

text: I will keep my Wii
text_zh: 我会保留我的Wii

text: $100 a year?? They fail to mention that in all those videos
text_zh: 一年100美元？？他们在那些视频里都没提

text: People paying $100/yr for mobile games on their TV is crazy
text_zh: 人们每年花 100 美元在电视上看手游，太疯狂了

text: Subscriptions were never a thing back in the 90’s unless it was a magazine
text_zh: 90 年代订阅从来都不是什么东西，除非是杂志

text: And you know that’s just the price they are starting out at for the yearly subscription. Once they hit the amount of users they want, I’m sure they will be increasing the subscription cost.
text_zh: 而且你知道那只是他们起步的年度订阅费。一旦他们达到想要的用户数量，我敢肯定他们会提高订阅费用。

text: Great info thank you ♥️💯♥
text_zh: 信息很棒，谢谢 ♥️💯♥

text: Up to $250 now and $85 for a year.
text_zh: 现在涨到 250 美元了，一年还要 85 美元。

text: To play games on the internet Xbox or PlayStation it’s more than that. So I get where your coming from but that’s where we are
text_zh: 要在网上玩游戏，Xbox或PlayStation不仅仅是这样。所以我明白你的意思，但这就是现状

text: Yeahhh let me take this off my future kid toys list 😂
text_zh: 耶！让我把这个从我未来孩子的玩具清单上划掉 😂

text: Wait a year!!!!!! 😩 See I was getting it for Christmas. Hell naw
text_zh: 等一年！！！！😩 我本来打算圣诞节收到的。不行不行

text: Thank you! 🙏🏾
text_zh: 谢谢！🙏🏾

text: I vote to bring back the OG … Wii !!!!
text_zh: 我支持带回初代……Wii！！！！

text: My cats kept peeing over the front edge of the petpivot😭😭😭😭😭
text_zh: 我的猫一直尿在 petpivot 的前面 😭😭😭😭😭

text: Just get them kids a refurbished Nintendo Wii - they don’t know any different
text_zh: 给孩子们买台翻新的任天堂Wii吧——他们根本不知道有什么区别。

text: Yep I’ve seeing it too I want one but that price says no
text_zh: 是的，我也看到了，想要一个，但是这个价格让我打消了这个念头

text: Hell nah I still got the Xbox Kinect I got for Christmas as a kid, my kids are playing with that 😭
text_zh: 才怪，我小时候圣诞节收到的 Xbox Kinect 还在呢，我孩子现在还在玩 😭

text: It’s better than upgrading your console every 5 years tbh, I would have to see how good the quality is tho s
text_zh: 老实说，这比每五年升级一次主机要好，不过我得看看质量怎么样 s

text: I do hate subscriptions so damn but in this case that's $8.50 a month for a huge game catalog that has a bunch more games coming. But another subscription is soooo lame.
text_zh: 我确实讨厌订阅，该死，但在这个例子里，每个月 8.50 美元能玩到海量的游戏库，而且还有更多游戏在路上。但又一个订阅真的太 F 了。

text: Right after this was a nex ad. I swiped away sooo quick lmao
text_zh: 这个后面紧接着就是个nex广告。我赶紧划走了，笑死

text: And that’s exactly why it’s still on TikTok and not at my house 🙂‍↕
text_zh: 这就是它还在TikTok上而不是在我家的原因🙂‍↕

text: Lemme get a Wii again
text_zh: 让我再买个 Wii

text: Xbox is $30 a month now, nex was $90 for the whole year 😭 But I am getting tired of everything having one now!!
text_zh: Xbox现在一个月30美元，Nex一年才90美元😭 但我真的开始厌倦现在到处都有这个了！！

text: Lowk the same price as a switch one that’s not that bad 100$ yearly for whatever game you want too isn’t bad neither but if they had like a holiday bundle that discounted some of that price I feel like it’d offset the negativity
text_zh: 说实话，价格跟Switch差不多，不算太贵，每年100美元随便玩什么游戏也不算亏，但如果有个假日礼包能打点折，我觉得能抵消一些负面评价。

text: Well I hate to be this guy but you know a Playstation is $400 to $600. Playstation plus is $17 after tax a month with is $204 a year. Plus the games you buy yearly. If you buy 3 games a year, thats on average $180. In game DLC could range upwards $100. So, you're paying $380+ a year bro.
text_zh: 好吧，我得说句扫兴的话，你知道一台 PlayStation 要 400 到 600 美元。PlayStation Plus 一个月 17 美元（税后）就是一年 204 美元。再加上你每年买的游戏，一年买 3 款游戏，平均就是 180 美元。游戏内 DLC 可能要 100 美元。所以，你一年要付 380 美元以上，哥们。

text: But you’ll pay 10 bucks a month for PlayStation plus for the cheapest subscription AND then pay 75 bucks a pop for each game AFTER buying a ps5 for 600 😅🤣🤣🤣🤣 sounds about right lmao
text_zh: 但是你每个月要花10块钱买PlayStation Plus最便宜的套餐，然后买了一台600块的PS5后，每款游戏还要花75块 😅🤣🤣🤣🤣 听起来没毛病哈哈哈哈

text: Everyone saying that it’s the same as any other gaming systems don’t get the point. Not one video I’ve seen mentions the subscription like the other systems. Some people don’t have the extra money to be be caught off guard especially during the holiday season.
text_zh: 所有说它和其他游戏系统一样的，都没抓住重点。我看的视频里没有一个提到订阅问题，不像其他系统。有些人没钱被突然冒出来的费用吓到，尤其是在节假日期间。

text: Everything else you gotta pay per game this … you just buy once a year
text_zh: 其他所有东西你都得按游戏付费，这个……你一年买一次就行

text: Literally nintendo switch online has the base subscription at 20$ a year with over 100 games and the ability to play online woth them being of actual quality and not mobile games with sprinkled in hand tracking
text_zh: 说真的，任天堂Switch在线服务，一年20块的标准订阅，送一百多款游戏，还能在线玩，而且质量不错，不是那种加了点体感玩法的手机游戏

text: That’s $8.33 a month, honestly not bad. We pay $9.99 a month for essential xbox game pass and that doesn’t include interactive games that burn energy.
text_zh: 那相当于每个月8.33美元，说实话不算贵。我们每个月花9.99美元买Xbox Game Pass Essentials，那还不包含能消耗体力的互动游戏。

text: That’s a good deal dude. I got a ps5 and x box game pass. Them $70 games add up. I will say ps5 is better but it’s not bad
text_zh: 这价格挺值的哥们。我买了PS5和Xbox Game Pass。那些70美元的游戏加起来可不少。我说实话PS5更好，但这个也不算差

text: I aint mad i just bought it for my 4 yr old …. I do feel like its an opinionated game 🤷🏽‍♂️get it if you want it or dont. But i definitely get other peoples opinions
text_zh: 我没什么意见，我刚给我4岁的孩子买了… 我确实觉得这是一个有主见的（需要考虑是否购买的）游戏 🤷🏽‍♂️想买就买，不想买就别买。但我也确实理解别人的看法

text: Idc we love the nex playground
text_zh: 无所谓，我们爱 nex playground

text: Okay but my toddlers and I LOVE IT
text_zh: 好吧，我和我的小宝贝们超爱它

text: A little dramatic I think it’s $80 a year lol
text_zh: 我觉得有点夸张了，一年 80 美元吧？ lol

text: I’m still getting it 😂😂😂😂😂I want to play with my children
text_zh: 我还是会买 😂😂😂😂😂我想和我孩子一起玩

text: Totally worth it
text_zh: 太值了

text: And I gotta buy the GAMES !?
text_zh: 而且我还要买游戏？！

text: We love ours!!
text_zh: 我们很喜欢我们的！

text: it has free games too. I feel like its definitely worth 100 a year.
text_zh: 它也有免费游戏。我觉得一年100美元很值。

text: Sounds bout right. ps5 monthly subscription is around 25 per month.
text_zh: 听起来差不多。PS5的月度订阅费大概是25美元一个月。

text: Bro not wrong but I waste way more than 100$ every year on way worse so it was worth it for my kid
text_zh: 哥们说得没毛病，但我每年浪费在更糟的事情上的钱远不止 100 美元，所以给我孩子买这个是值得的

text: Anything you pick is going to cost money like the meta quest or Nex requires a subscription, Nintendo switch games cost anywhere from 40-60 a game so pick the most affordable option.
text_zh: 你选什么都要花钱，像Meta Quest或者Nex都需要订阅，任天堂Switch游戏每个40-60块，所以选最实惠的。

text: Xbox like is 30 a month that’s well over 100 a year and idk about PlayStation but I’m pretty sure it’s the same thing.
text_zh: Xbox 一个月 30 美元，一年就超过 100 美元了，我不知道 PlayStation 的情况，但我很确定 PS 也是一样的。

text: I bought it my son he can not sit still for the life of him so for me it is worth it so my son can be active inside when it’s snowing outside he’s 3 he don’t need a PS5.
text_zh: 我给我儿子买了，他简直坐不住，所以对我来说很值得，我儿子可以在下雪的时候在室内活动，他才 3 岁，不需要 PS5。

text: Me wrapping up my Wii and letting the kids play it like I did in the early 2000s😇 #ProblemSolved❤️
text_zh: 我把我的 Wii 收起来，让孩子们玩，就像我 2000 年初做的那样😇 #问题解决了❤️

text: Thanks because I’m almost got it
text_zh: 谢谢，因为我差点就买下了

text: It’s just like PlayStation
text_zh: 这就像PlayStation一样

text: See I was gonna get it too but I'm tired of everything having a subscription. I didn't mind paying for additional games but I'm not paying monthly.
text_zh: 看吧，我也本来想买的，但我受够了什么东西都要订阅。本来付额外游戏钱我倒不介意，但我不付月费。

text: My son will know what an Xbox Kinect is 😂😭
text_zh: 我儿子会知道 Xbox Kinect 是啥了😂😭

text: I showed it to my husband & we found out they use AI so we said hell nahhh to the NEX playground
text_zh: 我给老公看了，我们发现他们用AI，我们就跟NEX游乐场说拜拜了

text: I got the nex playground last year. My kids don’t even like it because the games are boring. 😢 good idea, but the games really are just awful.
text_zh: 我去年买了 Nex Playground。我孩子都不喜欢，因为游戏太无聊了。😢 主意不错，但游戏确实太差劲了。

text: I knew it was a reason I kept forgetting to buy it
text_zh: 我就知道我一直记不得买它是有原因的。

text: The nex was on our Christmas list. Thank you for slapping me back to reality.
text_zh: Nex在我们圣诞节清单上。谢谢你把我拉回现实。

text: wanted to buy myself a playground for Christmas and just got my feelings hurt🥲 but thanks for the warning cousin!!
text_zh: 想圣诞节给自己买个 Playground，结果心碎了🥲 但还是谢谢表哥的提醒！！

text: Damn you just saved me so much money 🙏
text_zh: damn 你可真帮我省了不少钱 🙏

text: We live in subscription HELL
text_zh: 我们活在订阅地狱

text: I have the Nex, it’s great for the kids and they keep adding games monthly. My Xbox live subscription is annual and doesn’t even come with games.
text_zh: 我有Nex，对孩子们来说很棒，而且他们每个月还在不断增加新游戏。我的Xbox live订阅是按年算的，甚至不带游戏。

text: So that would be $8 a month for 50+ games when Xbox starts at $9.99 and goes up to $29.99 for the unlimited game pass. The nex playground is also physical games instead of sitting in front of a tv twiddling your thumbs. 😅 this
text_zh: 那一个月 8 块钱就能玩 50 多个游戏，而 Xbox 从 9.99 美元起，无限游戏通行证最高到 29.99 美元。而且那个游乐场是实体游戏，而不是坐在电视前傻玩。😅 这

text: Nex playground is basically a wii with a subscription attached to it.
text_zh: Nex playground基本上就是个带订阅的Wii。

text: Subscription hell!!!!!!!!!!!
Thank you!
text_zh: 谢谢！

text: Thank ya..will be taking it off the list 😅
text_zh: 谢谢你。。我把它从清单上划掉了 😅

text: The subscriptions are getting out of hand. EVERY BILLIONAIRE want to keep their hands in our pockets🙄
text_zh: 订阅简直没完没了。每个亿万富翁都想从我们口袋里掏钱🙄

text: I had the nex for Christmas gift omg
text_zh: 我圣诞节收到的礼物就是这个 Nex！

text: Yeah nope
text_zh: 嗯，不用了

text: It’s the same thing with Xbox PlayStation steam anything you play? You gotta have a subscription for.😂
text_zh: 这跟Xbox、PlayStation、Steam都一样，你玩什么都要订阅。😂

text: so y'all don't pay for PlayStation plus?
text_zh: 所以你们不买 PlayStation Plus 吗？

text: It’s awesome. We don’t have a switch or anything like that, and the nex playground is incredible to play and get some exercise.
text_zh: 太棒了。我们没有Switch之类的东西，而Nex游乐场玩起来非常棒，还能锻炼身体。

text: I’m the cheapest person in the world and I really don’t think it’s bad priced for a video game lol
text_zh: 我是世界上最抠门的人，但我觉得这个游戏机的价格不贵，lol

text: It’s legit 27 cents a day for games Its not bad at all 😅😅😅
text_zh: 一天才27美分的游戏，不算贵啊 😅😅😅

text: AND YOU CANT USE A CONTROLLER!! im sorry but i dont wanna ALWAYS be moving trying to play a video game 😭
text_zh: 而且你不能用手柄！！抱歉，但我不想一直动来动去玩游戏 😭

text: My son opened it today for Christmas and played on it for 3 hours with me. We had a blast
text_zh: 我儿子今天圣诞节打开收到的，和我一起玩了3个小时。我们玩得很开心

text: if you got netflix or really any tv subscription you pay over $100 a year for them
text_zh: 如果你有 Netflix 或者任何电视订阅，你一年都要花一百多美元

text: Yes but its sold out and im irritated
text_zh: 是啊，但卖完了，我有点恼火

text: AH SUBSCRIPTION?????? They ain’t said nun of that
text_zh: 啊订阅费??????他们根本没说这个

text: Y’all pay 60 dollar each for one game on a PS5 😭
text_zh: 你们在 PS5 上每个游戏花60美元 😭

text: So can Xbox bring back the Kinect?
text_zh: 那 Xbox 能不能把 Kinect 带回来？

text: just get a Wii 😂
text_zh: 直接买个Wii就行了 😂

text: It used to be $99 when it first came out 💔 I should have bought it last year for my kids
text_zh: 刚出来的时候是99美元 💔 我去年就该给我孩子买了

text: Yes the nex playground pissed me off when I looked it up
text_zh: 是的，下次那个游乐场我查了之后气死了

text: Parents before you sit and say “well it’s only 100$ for multiple games” your child needs to be able to choose 1 thing they want and do their research on it. You never get to choose what games are available on the nex so if they take it off your child will still ask u to buy it even with that multitude of games they got
text_zh: 爸爸妈妈们，在你们坐下来说“嗯，多款游戏才100美元”之前，你们的孩子需要能够选择他们想要的一样东西，并对此进行研究。你永远无法选择 Nex 上有什么游戏，所以如果他们把它下架了，你的孩子还是会求你买，即使他们有很多游戏。

text: I have been thinking about getting the nex playground for my girls bc it seemed like a good deal NOT KNOWING about the sub part so thank you for popping up on my fyp 🤣
text_zh: 我之前还在想给我女儿们买那个新的游乐场，觉得是个不错的deal，结果不知道还要订阅，谢谢你出现在我的推荐页🤣

text: There’s also Leap frog LeapLand Adventures it’s around $35 and it’s all educational games. ❤
text_zh: 还有个Leap Frog LeapLand Adventures，大概35美元，全是教育游戏。❤

text: i know u damn damn lying
text_zh: 我他妈发誓你在撒谎

text: Got it for my kids last Christmas and they only play with it like once a month 🤦🏿‍♂
text_zh: 去年圣诞节给孩子们买的，他们一年就玩一两次 🤦🏿‍♂

text: I played it at the store and was like "I have a Nintendo switch!! play that!"
text_zh: 我在店里玩过，当时就想“我都有Nintendo Switch了！！玩那个！”

text: Bro Xbox be 30x12 do the maf 🤫🫣
text_zh: 哥，Xbox要30x12，来点骚操作 🤫🫣

text: I heard it cost to get extra games but it comes with free games you just don’t get the new games
text_zh: 我听说要钱才能买额外的游戏，但它自带免费游戏，只是你得不到新游戏

text: It’s literally an Xbox Kinect
text_zh: 这不就是个 Xbox Kinect 吗

text: i mean that’s not that bad compared to playstation and xbox lol . every single console that have subscriptions have a package for over a year and they ALL over 100. playstation being 150 a year while the console itself reaching 500 dollars. nex playground is actually worth it especially for kids and it’s cheaper lol
text_zh: 说实话，跟Playstation和Xbox比起来这已经算不错了，lol。现在有订阅制的游戏机，一年的套餐基本都超过100块。Playstation一年要150块，主机本身都快500块了。Nex playground其实挺值的，尤其是对孩子们来说，而且还便宜lol

text: Thank you! I literally had the NEX playground in my cart debating it, a subscription is crazy!
text_zh: 谢谢！我真的把NEX Playground放进购物车里纠结了，订阅费也太离谱了！

text: Nahhhhh, nex playground is worth the money! You haven’t done enough research, because you haven’t tried it. It’s worth the price tag. My kids stay active..they love it!
text_zh: 不不不，nex playground 值这个钱！你研究得还不够，因为你没试过。它绝对值这个价。我的孩子们保持活跃……他们很喜欢！

text: We live in alaska and the nex playground helps my kids get that energy out during the colder months 😩but i agree i didnt know i had to buy a subscription til i got it
text_zh: 我们住在阿拉斯加，在寒冷的月份，nex 游乐场能帮我的孩子们消耗能量😩但我也同意，直到拿到手我才知道要买订阅

text: I'm already paying for 4 Xbox live accounts per month and a monthly switch subscription so I don't feel like the $10 a month online subscription is bad for the Nex playground. I don't think any game systems exist rn that don't have monthly subs for online games? Plus you don't have to have the subscription you can still play the basic games without it.
text_zh: 我每个月已经付了4个Xbox live账号和Switch的订阅费了，所以我觉得这个Nex playground每月10美元的订阅费不算什么。我觉得现在市面上没有不带月度订阅费的游戏吧？而且你又不用非得订阅，不订阅也可以玩基础游戏。

text: Idk I got it for my kids for Christmas. My oldest has an Xbox. The nex playground is technically for my 3 year old. But I’m sure they’ll play together. It’s a Christmas gift whatever makes them happy idc imma get it. 🤷🏽‍♀️
text_zh: 不知道，我给孩子买的圣诞礼物。我老大有 Xbox。这个 Playground 技术上是给 3 岁的。但我确定他们会一起玩。反正就是个圣诞礼物，让他们开心就行，我不在乎我就会买。🤷🏽‍♀️

text: Not the nex playground ad right under this video 😭😂😂😂😂
text_zh: 这不是 Nex Playground 的广告就在这个视频下面吗 😭😂😂😂😂

text: A family member bought my son a VR for Christmas and I seen the nex playground at target and I was regretting allowing them to buy the VR bc the playground looked better, so thank you for this video and reassurance 😂
text_zh: 一个亲戚圣诞节给我儿子买了个 VR，我看到 Target 有个新的游乐场，当时真后悔让他们买 VR 了，因为那个游乐场看起来更棒，所以谢谢你这个视频让我放心了 😂

text: Tell me why this is the first video I see after buying my son a Nex playground. I read an article that convinced me. I feel like $100 a year to keep my kid away from my VR stuff sounds like a bargain. $100 to keep my stuff from getting messed with.
text_zh: 你们说为什么我买了我儿子一个Nex playground之后看到的第一个视频就是这个。我看了篇文章才下定决心的。我觉得每年100美元让我的孩子远离我的VR设备听起来挺值的。100美元能让我自己的东西不被他乱弄。

text: you can get nintendo switch online and Playstation plus for cheaper than get the nex playground yearly subscription🥀.
text_zh: 你可以用比NEX Playground年费更便宜的价格买到Nintendo Switch Online和PlayStation Plus 🥀。

text: Dang thank you!! The Xbox Kinect neverrr
text_zh: 靠，谢谢！！Xbox Kinect 永远不行

text: You took the thought of buying the next playground right out my head after you said subscription..
text_zh: 你一提订阅，我买下一个游乐场的念头就打消了。

text: I mean I pay subscription for PlayStation what’s one more 😂🤷🏼‍♀️
text_zh: 我是我付了PlayStation的订阅费，再加一个有什么关系 😂🤷🏼‍♀️

text: You pay $500 for a PlayStation and $60 a game that’s 120 for just 2 games….not to mention you buy several games a year….nex playground is worth it for kids $80 a year is CHEAP 🙄 it’s equivalent to 7.00 a month yall pay more for door dash….stop the bs
text_zh: 你买个PlayStation要500块，一个游戏60块，光2个游戏就要120块……更别说你一年还要买好几个游戏……nex playground一年80块对孩子来说是值得的，很便宜 🙄 相当于一个月7块钱，你们叫DoorDash都花得比这多……别瞎扯了

text: or a WII cause i still have mine
text_zh: 或者WII，因为我还有我的

text: thank you for a honest review
text_zh: 谢谢你一个诚实的评价

text: It's still less than paying for Xbox live or things like that like it's a great option for younger kids too

text: That's why I did not buy it for my kids. I want to buy a game when I can afford and it and own it.

text: In my eyes you paying that per game for Xbox and PlayStation (2K and madden) and they drop every each so I’d rather pay a membership every year for $85 and get multiple games then pay $85+ to only get one game
text_zh: 在我看来，你买 Xbox 和 PlayStation 的游戏（2K 和 Madden）要花那么多钱，而且它们每年都出，我宁愿每年花 85 块钱买会员玩好多游戏，也不愿意花 85 块钱只买一个游戏

text_zh: 我再也不想要了。我受够订阅制了。

text: …bought it.
text_zh: …买了。

text: Well I have 5 young and energetic kids, who don’t understand the concept of internet safety or have the hand eye coordination for controllers so $100 a year on this fun game system they can do over and over at home vs $100 for ONE HOUR at the trampoline park… yeah I’ll be purchasing.
text_zh: 嗯，我有5个精力充沛的小孩，他们不懂网络安全的概念，或者手眼协调性不行，所以一年100美元买这个他们可以反复在家玩的有趣游戏系统，比去蹦床公园花100美元玩一个小时…是的，我要买了。

text: i personally like the nex, i have a 4 year old son and the subscription is def worth it, new games are released every month and for the xbox / playstation the games cost anywhere from $50+ you get over 100+ games with the nex subscription
text_zh: 我个人喜欢 Nex，我有个4岁的儿子，订阅绝对值，每个月都会发布新游戏，而 Xbox / PlayStation 的游戏价格从 50 美元起，而 Nex 订阅你可以玩 100 多款游戏。

text: A ps5 $500 and they charge you $50 per game🫣🤭 i got it for my kids🥰 $90 per year unlimited games not bad
text_zh: 一台 PS5 就要 500 美元，他们一个游戏收你 50 美元 🫣🤭 我是给我孩子买的 🥰 一年 90 美元无限游戏，不算差

text: I just got one
text_zh: 我刚买了一个

text: I just brought my kids one and I’m excited for them I’ll pay the lil $100
text_zh: 我刚给我孩子买了一个，我很期待他们。我花了个小 100 块

text: As a parent I like the Nex play because they aren't storaging images or videos of my kids to a cloud.
text_zh: 作为家长，我喜欢 Nex play，因为他们不会把孩子的图像或视频存储到云端。

text: Saved me thank ya 😭

text: Wait til you find out you pay a subscription to Xbox and PlayStation 80-100 dollars and then pay for each game 30-120 dollars
text_zh: 等你知道玩 Xbox 和 PlayStation 要花 80-100 美元的订阅费，再花 30-120 美元买游戏的时候，你就知道了

text: I feel like y'all forgetting this is a console that's really suited for small kids. Even then 85$ is a AAA price and a continued 7$/month to access a large library of game is cheaper than the shit Xbox and PlayStation does
text_zh: 我觉得你们都忘了这是一个非常适合小孩子玩的游戏机。就算那样，85美元也算AAA级价格了，而且还要持续7美元/月才能玩大量游戏，比Xbox和PlayStation的那些破烂便宜多了

text: “Removes from cart”

text: I literally haven't played on a gaming console in years. I did for the 1st time in forever this yr and was so confused when the game wouldn't just play when I put the disc in, it had to download. What type of inconvenient futuristic stuff do we got going on rn. I had to wait hours.
text_zh: 我这几年都没玩过游戏机了。今年终于玩了一次，结果游戏放进去不能直接玩，还得下载，把我搞糊涂了。现在这是什么不方便的未来科技啊。我等了好几个小时。

text: What?!
text_zh: 什么？！

text: Thank you! I was thinking about it

text: Give me a wii and just dance mario and wii sports

text: The gov is shutdown, people can’t afford food and ya worried about— mmm anyways when people start doin real give-aways and or donations come holla at me. Until then ya can’t even get a view out of me *in my best 50 cent voice*
text_zh: 政府都关了，人们连饭都吃不上，你还操心这个——嗯，不管怎样，等有人搞真正的抽奖或者捐赠的时候再叫我。在此之前，你连个镜头都别想从我这儿获得（我用我最像 50 Cent 的语气说）

text: Thank you
text_zh: 谢谢
